Name: -1_good_taste_think_person
Representative_Docs: ['To mean it means that the someone being referred to makes or usually for the most part things which are very good in terms of quality or appearance.  In reality though it effectively usually means that the person who is being referred to makes choices usually aligned with mine.  A person who has good taste may also be someone who consistently chooses things which are just generally popular overall.', 'If I say someone has good taste it means I agree with their sense of style. I think that what they have put together flows well and is cohesive rather than clashes and seems out if place. This applies to fashion and decor. It also might mean they like the same forms of media that I do for the same reasons. Or the same forms of entertainment. It means that I believe that they think similar to me.', "When I think about what it means to have good taste, several things come to mind. The person may have a sense of colors that look well together. They may have ideas of design, that are appealing to many people. A specific example of having good taste might be a clothing designer who has a knack for combining the 'right' colors and creating a figure-flattering style."]

Name: 0_taste_good_say_like
Representative_Docs: ['If someone has a good taste, then they like things that many people view are "good". It\'s a very subjective thing to have a "good taste", I think it depends on how you grew up. In certain areas, it\'d be luxury things or elegant things that are defined as good taste. In other parts, it could just be like something that isn\'t as "Trendy" as what most people like. I\'d also say that people with "good taste", tend to think on their own and don\'t follow what others like.', 'I’d say a person has good taste if I like similar things.', 'When I say that someone has good taste, it means that in my opinion, the things that person likes is similar to what I like, so, therefore, they have good taste.']

Name: 1_things_art_like_choices
Representative_Docs: ["They appreciate things like the writing style, colors and shades, and the way they work together. They don't often go for the gaudy or obvious but appreciate the subtleties of art.", 'I think that their taste is similar to mine and shows that they like high quality things. I also think that they can see the finer things in life and can appreciate them.', 'The things they like are aesthetically pleasing. They understand how things go together. And they typically do not offend people with the choices they make.']

Name: 2_means_like_good_services
Representative_Docs: ['Generally it means I agree with their aesthetic choices and they choose things that look good.', "I think it means that people chose to do or see or say or dress or participate in a way that is morally good and not offensive to other people. They don't like things that are garish. They respect other people and interact with them as they would want others to interact with them. They are not exhibitionists.", 'I believe that it means that they have a good selection of goods or services used by them.  It means other people value those choices and admire their selection of goods or services.  It makes the person more desirable because of a finer choices in life.']

Name: 3_sense_good_eye_person
Representative_Docs: ["Someone with good taste would displaying something that the majority would find appealing. With movies I think it would be someone who always picks a solid movie, doesn't have to be the best just one you enjoy. It can also apply to aesthetics with designing its not always the most popular arrangement of art/furniture just one that majority would think looks good.", "Some one who has good taste has an eye for quality, craftsmanship and fashion sense. It's demonstration can range from putting together a nice outfit to hosting an elegant dinner party for friends.", 'I think someone who has good taste has a sense of what is real art or fashion.  Not too outrageous and something that is pleasing to the eye.  Good taste is usually looked upon as admirable.']

Name: 4_treats_people_good_things
Representative_Docs: ['Someone that has generally liked opinion on certain topics, usually something that aligns with my taste because I like to think my taste is good taste.  They have good taste and they like things that most and I like so they have good taste.', 'The person prefers to associate themselves with people who are ethical, hardworking, attractive, and have a certain style. Typically it is a person who has wealth. They like and enjoy the good things in life.', 'It would be someone who enjoys things that make them think.  Things that also are lasting and not ephemeral that one enjoys are good taste to me.  Also I measure the time and effort one puts into something as showing they have good taste.']
